channel.title: gruntjs on T++
channel.description: Recent content in gruntjs on T++

item.title: Building Durandal with Grunt
item.description: Durandal is a great framework, but if you are moving your application to a production environment chances are you want to build it. Building a RequireJS app can be done with R.JS, with Durandal’s build tool Weyland, or with a task runner like Mimosa or Grunt. Weyland is a good option if you don’t plan to do anything else, but I am interested in a lot of the plugins available for more general tools like Grunt.
